meta.title: Qudurat — Enterprise Assessment Platform
meta.description: Bilingual enterprise HR assessment platform for MENA. Cognitive, personality, behavioral, and skills testing with AI-powered insights.

hero.title: Hire smarter. Retain longer.
hero.subtitle: Qudurat is the MENA-first HR assessment platform that combines cognitive, personality, behavioral, and skills testing with AI-powered bilingual insights.

features.title: Everything you need to assess talent
features.subtitle: From first screening to final decision, Qudurat covers the full hiring and development lifecycle.
